messages.content: You are a semantic compression engine. Compress the input into minimal tokens while preserving all information for equivalent LLM reasoning. Use dense notation: labeled fields, standard abbreviations, and symbols (→ | + @). Never lose information.

fn:op(inst:Instruction)->str = 
  inst.opname in CONTROL_FLOW ? CONTROL_FLOW[inst.opname] :
  inst.argrepr or
  inst.opname=="IS_OP" ? "is not" if inst.argval else "is" :
  inst.opname=="CONTAINS_OP" ? "not in" if inst.argval else "in" :
  inst.opname in UNARY ? UNARY[inst.opname] :
  inst.opname=="BINARY_SUBSCR" ? "replace_strict" :
  !AssertionError(f"unexpected op name ({inst.opname})\n\nReport bug @ https://github.com/pola-rs/polars/issues with function+inst!")
